title: Berisfords Double FACE Poly Satin Ribbon, Pale Pink, 15 mm
description: From the manufacturer ABOUT BERISFORDS RIBBONS Today the company sets the benchmark for the manufacture of quality ribbons, bows, fabrics, trimmings and components. Peter Bowers, company managing director, heads up a team of 100 employees based at their Cheshire Mill. He is joined by fellow directors Andrew Walker, finance; Graham Parker, production; Matthew Roberts, sales; and Fiona Hampton, marketing and design – the first female director at the company in its 155-year history. Peter said: “In terms of markets, we supply the textile industry and we are very strong in the food and packaging markets as well as developments in making components for the bra industry.” Recognizing the changes in market needs has been a key factor in Berisfords continued success.
